title: selaginella zhangii
intro: Selaginella zhangii is a species of plant in the Selaginellaceae family, commonly referred to as a type of spikemoss or resurrection plant due to its ability to revive from a desiccated state. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various respiratory issues such as bronchitis, coughs, and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Selaginella zhangii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve lung function, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory distress. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
